name: Colonial Brown Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sour milk (2 cups skim milk plus 2 tsp. vinegar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (325°F if using glass loaf pans). Lightly spray two 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pans.
2. Combine dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Whisk sour milk and molasses in a small bowl.
4. Mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Divide the batter between the prepared pans.
6. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
7. Cool in the pans on racks for 15 minutes.
8. Turn the loaves onto racks and cool completely.
9. Can be made one day ahead. Makes 2 loaves (9 slices each).
